title: QuickSortX
body:
![QuickSortX Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/184324b4199ac4ab43f0d0eac8186d477494425a.png)
Advertisement:

Text Version # QuickSortX ## Transform Chest Chaos into Perfect Order **QuickSortX** is the ultimate inventory management solution for Minecraft servers that automatically categorizes and sorts chest contents with intelligent precision. Say goodbye to the endless scroll through jumbled items and hello to a beautifully organized storage system! ## ✨ Features ### 🎯 One-Click Sorting With just a Shift+Right-Click, transform chaotic storage into perfectly organized categories. Items are automatically sorted by type and rarity, making finding what you need effortless. ### 🧠 Smart Category Recognition QuickSortX intelligently recognizes and sorts items into logical categories: - **Tools** (sorted by material: wood → stone → iron → gold → diamond → netherite) - **Weapons** (organized by combat effectiveness) - **Armor** (arranged by protection value) - **Ores & Minerals** (from common to rare) - **Food** (sorted by saturation) - **Building Blocks** (grouped by type) - **Redstone Components** (all your automation needs) - **Brewing Supplies** (potions and ingredients) - **Farming Items** (seeds, crops, and more) - **Decorative Items** (for the aesthetic builders) - **Miscellaneous** (everything else, neatly organized) ### ⚙️ Auto-Sort Toggle Enable the `/autosort` command to automatically sort chests when you close them, keeping your storage perpetually organized with zero extra effort. ### 🛠️ Fully Configurable Customize every aspect of QuickSortX through the config.yml: - Modify category order and grouping - Customize sorting messages - Enable/disable visual separators between categories - Toggle persistent player preferences ## 💎 Perfect For: - **Survival Servers** - Keep community storage organized - **Skyblock & Faction Servers** - Optimize limited storage space - **Roleplay Servers** - Maintain immersive, organized shops and inventories - **Creative Builders** - Find materials quickly in large storage systems - **Server Admins** - Improve player experience with quality-of-life enhancements ## 🚀 Installation 1. Download QuickSortX.jar 2. Place in your server's plugins folder 3. Restart the server 4. Start enjoying organized storage! ## 🎮 How to Use - **Shift + Right-Click** any chest to instantly sort its contents - Type `/autosort` to toggle automatic sorting when closing chests - Customize via config.yml for a personalized experience ## 🔄 Compatible With - Spigot/Paper 1.20+ --- *"The best organizational tool since shulker boxes!"* - Happy Server Owner 1.1 Perms update 🔐 Permissions Core Permissions quicksortx.sort - Manual chest sorting (Shift + Right-Click) quicksortx.autosort - Auto-sort when closing chests quicksortx.autosort.toggle - Use /autosort command quicksortx.admin - Admin commands + bypass restrictions quicksortx.reload - Reload plugin configuration Convenience Groups quicksortx.basic - Manual sorting only (perfect for new players) | Basically its like the manu al sort quicksortx.user - Full user features (manual + auto-sort + toggle) | Basically normal sort + manual quicksortx.* - All permissions (for staff/admins) | reloading , etc bypass, you get the point
